title: Uninitialized register default value is not 'x' ?

features.name: uninitialized reg assertion in formal
features.description: Code should include an uninitialized register used in an assertion comparison within an initial block, where formal verification incorrectly handles the 'x' state

features.name: uninitialized 4-bit reg declaration
features.description: Code should include a 4-bit uninitialized reg declaration without an initial value, which should default to 'x' per IEEE 1800 semantics
